title: eulophia parvilabris
intro: Eulophia parvilabris, also known as the Small-lipped Eulophia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Eulophiinae subtribe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia parvilabris include its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and treat various infections. In traditional medicine, Eulophia parvilabris is prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
